projectDescription: A low-overhead sampling profiler for Java that collects CPU, allocation, lock, and native memory profiles using AsyncGetCallTrace and perf_events, producing flame graphs and JFR output.
keyFeatures: CPU time profiling using perf_events + AsyncGetCallTrace without safepoint bias
Java heap allocation profiling with TLAB-driven sampling
Native memory allocation and leak detection via malloc/free interception
Lock contention profiling for both Java monitors and pthread locks
Wall-clock profiling for latency and startup analysis
Interactive flame graph output in HTML with differential comparison
JFR (Java Flight Recorder) output compatible with JDK Mission Control and IntelliJ IDEA
Heatmap visualization for analyzing continuous profiling data over time
Non-Java application profiling via LD_PRELOAD and C API
Continuous profiling with loop mode and time-based rotation
publicApiSurface: asprof -d N - profile for N seconds duration
asprof --jfrsync CONFIG - synchronized Java Flight Recording
asprof --all - enable all common profiling events simultaneously
profiler.execute(String command) - Java API command execution
asprof_init() / asprof_execute() - C API for native applications
--cstack fp|dwarf|vm|vmx|no - native stack walking mode selection
